# Feature Specification: User Auth & Dashboard

## Overview

A simple application with login and a personal dashboard.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC1 User can log in with email and password on the root page
- [ ] AC2 After login, user is redirected to their dashboard at /dashboard

## Notes

The app has two primary routes: / (login) and /dashboard (user home).
All form inputs must be validated before submission.
